---
title: "Contributing Guidelines and Codes of Conduct for Open Projects" 
description: | 
  This talk was given in the week 4 session of the 6th cohort of the Open Seeds program by OLS, held online.
date: "2022-10-03"
image: OLS_logo.png
categories:
  - 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
  - 🌍Open Science
  - 📚Education
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event][event]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< fa play-circle >}} Oral presentation (English)][oral-present]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)][slides]{.btn target=_blank} 

[event]: https://openlifesci.org/ols-6
[oral-present]: https://youtu.be/M0szFcbGdBU?t=2576
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7536817
